features.name: class with string parameter
features.description: Code should include a class with a string type parameter that defaults to a string literal value

features.name: typedef with explicit string parameter
features.description: Code should include a typedef that instantiates a parameterized class with an explicit string parameter value

features.name: assignment between objects with same string parameter value
features.description: Code should include an assignment between class objects where both classes have the same string parameter value, triggering incorrect multiple specialization
